summary: Full backend and frontend testing of SCSS AB ADVOCATE app. All 15 backend API tests pass. Frontend core flows working: branding, model toggle, chat with Claude AI, session management, email panel CRUD, email detail view, attach-to-chat button visible.

issues: App design is excellent - high contrast dark theme with cyan/purple accents, proper typography, shimmering effects all working correctly

critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 333: Claude chat injects full conversation history by re-sending all user messages through LlmChat, which may cause duplicate messages since LlmChat tracks session internally - this could inflate token usage but is functional
No rate limiting on /api/chat endpoint - could be abused in production
server.py uses synchronous MongoClient (pymongo) in async FastAPI context - should use motor (async MongoDB driver) for production performance
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test sessions/emails during testing. 1 test email remains (ETW Denial Notice - Test). 5 sessions remain from testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features verified: branding (MazZKiLL@ logo, SCSS AB ADVOCATE, #1 Social Benefit subtitle), model toggle (Claude Sonnet 4.5/Grok 3 with testid model-btn-claude/model-btn-grok), chat with Claude returns detailed Alberta policy responses with markdown, sessions created in sidebar with message count, email panel with CRUD and detail view all working. Use data-testid: chat-input-textarea, chat-submit-button, toggle-email-panel, add-email-button, save-email-button, email-subject-input etc. Grok 3 model toggle visible but not tested for actual chat response. The 'Attach to Chat' button in email detail view is visible but attach flow not tested end-to-end.
rca_of_issues: No critical issues found. One console 500 error was observed during early testing but did not affect functionality - likely a transient network error.
